component.name: Xeneon Edge Control
component.summary: Native Linux control for the Corsair Xeneon Edge touchscreen

description.p: Xeneon Edge Control gives Linux users real control over the CORSAIR XENEON EDGE 14.5 inch LCD touchscreen, which otherwise has no official Linux support (iCUE is Windows only and does not run under Wine).

ul.li: Brightness, contrast, sharpness, color presets and RGB gains over DDC/CI
Four touch modes, including a pointer free ripple indicator
A fullscreen system dashboard on the Edge (clock, CPU, GPU, memory)
Reverse engineered, confirmation gated access to the device HID protocol
Remembers your settings and can reapply them at login

description.p: First release: DDC display control, touch modes and calibration, HID recon, and the Edge dashboard.
